top.title: Sri Lanka repatriates 238 Iranian sailors stranded after US torpedo attack
top.summary: The survivors of the US attack on Iranian vessel Iris Dena, which claimed the lives of 104 people, were among those sent home.

top.title: 'Bit of pain' worth long-term security from Iran, Bessent tells BBC
top.summary: US Treasury Secretary said a "small bit of economic pain" was worth it to eliminate the threat of Iranian strikes on Western capitals.

top.title: Trump's rift with Pope is playing out in public - it's costing him valuable support
top.summary: Leading conservative Catholics tell the BBC why they back the American pontiff in his spat with Trump.

top.title: Booking.com customers warned of 'reservation hijacking' after hack
top.summary: The travel platform said it had changed Pins to protect customers but would not say how many were affected.

top.title: Google to punish sites that trap people in with back button tricks
top.summary: The tech giant said it will punish sites that block back button navigation from June.

top.title: Palantir defends its record as MPs demand more scrutiny of data use
top.summary: NHS guidance that all hospitals should be using Palantir software from this month has sparked a backlash.

title.#text: The perfect successor to Lost has been hiding from me for years
Walmart is updating its 4K streaming box with Gemini and Matter support
More phone cameras should come with telephoto lenses
